_README_FIRST: This file tracks the library's OPEN hours. If open_time and close_time are identical, the kiosk remains closed all day and stays asleep.

__HELP_VALID_STATES__.screen-off: PC stays on (accessible via SSH), but the monitor backlight turns completely off during closed hours.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.suspend: Sleep to RAM. Super fast wake-up, drops machine into a very low-power state during closed hours.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.hibernate: Sleep to Disk. Zero power drain. Requires Linux swap space.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.hybrid-sleep: Saves state to disk AND sleeps to RAM.
__HELP_VALID_STATES__.off: Complete hardware shutdown. Motherboard RTC timer will physically turn the PC back on at the next open hour.

=================== LIVE CONFIGURATION =: Edit the active open hours and the target sleep state below.
